name: Scareclaw Alternative
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>肆世壊の継承</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スケアクロー・オルタネイティブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 3 "Scareclaw" monsters; for the rest of this turn, your opponent can only Special Summon monsters in Defense Position. During your turn: You can banish this card from your GY; inflict 100 damage to your opponent for each Defense Position monster on the field. You can only use this effect of "Scareclaw Alternative" once per turn.
eff: Tribute 3 "Scareclaw" monsters; for the rest of this turn, your opponent can only Special Summon monsters in Defense Position. During your turn: You can banish this card from your GY; inflict 100 damage to your opponent for each Defense Position monster on the field. You can only use this effect of "Scareclaw Alternative" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
